body.title: D335: Move messaging channels (Discord, Gmail) to utility closet
body.result: Discord comms transport: DiscordTransport wraps discord_bot.send() as Transport subclass. comms://discord/<channel_id> addressing. 11 tests.
body.description: Move Discord bot, Gmail poller, and future channels out of Igor into the utility closet. Agents subscribe to channels via registration. Enables: channel availability when Igor is down, intermittency handling for Discord, multi-agent channel sharing. Dovetails with D335 platform layer.
